sourceTitle: AI in Teaching and Learning — ETH Zurich
evidenceSnippetOriginal: As a lecturer you are responsible for the content you provide to your students. This means that teaching materials created with GenAI must be subjected to quality control by you... You determine whether and how GenAI may be used in your courses.
